title: CraftingXP
description: The mod adds experience points when you create something.
body:
# CraftingXP
This mod introduces a unique system that rewards players with experience points for crafting items.   
The Crafting XP mod is compatible with other mods and easy to install.
It adds a new layer of fun to the game, encouraging players to experiment with various crafting combinations.    
In case of any problems, please contact us.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MZviEcnS/images/718efcba4ff8e9335f13c55d2f90c5d72507d424.png)
